title: capabilities
description: Session-startup announcement of kernel versions and supported features. Emitted by the host after registering its sink, before any evaluation. The host follows up with a negotiated render-mime list (see set-render-mimes / *render-mimes*) which the kernel uses to gate expensive MIME bundle production.

protocol_version.description: Envelope grammar version this build implements. Matches the schema directory name (v1/); hosts use it to detect protocol drift before processing subsequent envelopes.

kernel_version.description: Maxima's *autoconf-version* string. Null if the global isn't bound.

packages.description: Maxima packages the host has chosen to advertise. The kernel does not auto-detect; the host knows what it cares about announcing.

supports.description: Feature flags this kernel-events build provides (e.g. "streaming", "debug_events", "cancellation").
